title: Cogs & Crowns
description: Create centred modpack for those of Royal statue.
body: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png) A Create mod centred modpack aiming to extend the features of vanilla Minecraft with chaotic machinery and extensive biomes. Focus on crafting expansive Kingdoms powered and automated by the coggy mod of Create. ### Fabric Built with the Fabric ModLoader for improved performance and the access to amazing mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and extra complemetary mods. ### Members - [LieOnLion](https://www.youtube.com/@lieonlion) - [REDPalette12](https://www.youtube.com/@redpalette12) - [bubble](https://www.youtube.com/@bubble11xx) - [Play With Panda](https://www.youtube.com/@playwithpanda36) - [Truce](https://www.youtube.com/@Truce_ecurT) - [dadmannwalking](https://www.youtube.com/@dadmannwalking) - [JustAnotherRemnant](https://www.youtube.com/@jar501) - [AbluishRadio](https://www.youtube.com/@abluishradio) - [Massdistrukt](https://www.twitch.tv/massdistrukt) - [Mia_YT_Playzz](https://www.twitch.tv/mia_yt_playzz) - [EmperorBricks](https://www.twitch.tv/emper0rbricks) - [McFrostio](https://www.twitch.tv/mcfrostio) - [Nexitye](https://www.twitch.tv/nexitye) - [MelloeTV](https://www.twitch.tv/melloetv) The official modpack of the Cogs & Crowns SMP. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png) [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://dsc.lieonlion.dev) [![youtube](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/youtube.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@lieonlion?sub_confirmation=1) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lieonlion) [![patreon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/patreon.svg)](https://www.patreon.com/LieOnLion) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png) [**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/banners/bisect-banner-spruce-chest.png)**](https://bisect.lieonlion.dev)
